text_block_list.text: The spring Tenno Sho has arrived.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Everyone has been eager for the big<n>BNW
rematch at the new venue,<n>Hanshin Racecourse,
but...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Really?! You just had to get yourself<n>hurt, huh?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
But don't worry! Since I can't run, I'll<n>cheer you
two on with my whole<n>being instead!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Ugh, don't. Just use a quarter of your<n>being so
you don't destroy the<n>eardrums of everyone
around you.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Hello, Taishin. It appears we're in for<n>another
head-to-head battle today.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I created my winning equation<n>through sheer
determination and hard<n>work...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: I'll show you just how effective it is<n>today!
